meaning: A person who makes a conscious commitment to support and stand up for a marginalized group, even if they are not a member of that group.
definition: A person who makes a conscious commitment to support and stand up for a marginalized group, even if they are not a member of that group.
example: As an ally, she attended the rally to show solidarity with the disabled community.
exampleHindi: एक सहयोगी के रूप में, वह विकलांग समुदाय के साथ एकजुटता दिखाने के लिए रैली में शामिल हुईं।

meaning: A shared area of agreement, interest, or belief found between people who have different opinions or cultural backgrounds.
definition: A shared area of agreement, interest, or belief found between people who have different opinions or cultural backgrounds.
example: Despite their different backgrounds, the parents found common ground in wanting the best education for their kids.
exampleHindi: अपनी भिन्न पृष्ठभूमियों के बावजूद, माता-पिता ने अपने बच्चों के लिए सर्वोत्तम शिक्षा चाहने में समान आधार पाया।

meaning: The process of exchanging information, ideas, and feelings between people from different cultural backgrounds.
definition: The process of exchanging information, ideas, and feelings between people from different cultural backgrounds.
example: Clear cross-cultural communication is vital for the success of multinational business negotiations.
exampleHindi: बहुराष्ट्रीय व्यापार वार्ता की सफलता के लिए स्पष्ट अंतर-सांस्कृतिक संचार महत्वपूर्ण है।

meaning: The respectful study, learning, and sharing of elements of another culture to understand and honor its heritage.
definition: The respectful study, learning, and sharing of elements of another culture to understand and honor its heritage.
example: Attending a traditional tea ceremony and learning about its history is a form of cultural appreciation.
exampleHindi: पारंपरिक चाय समारोह में भाग लेना और उसके इतिहास के बारे में सीखना सांस्कृतिक प्रशंसा का एक रूप है।

meaning: The unacknowledged or inappropriate adoption of customs, practices, or ideas of one people or society by members of another, more dominant group.
definition: The unacknowledged or inappropriate adoption of customs, practices, or ideas of one people or society by members of another, more dominant group.
example: Wearing a traditional native headdress as a fashion accessory is widely seen as cultural appropriation.
exampleHindi: फैशन एक्सेसरी के रूप में पारंपरिक देशी हेडड्रेस पहनना व्यापक रूप से सांस्कृतिक विनियोग के रूप में देखा जाता है।

meaning: The ability to understand, appreciate, and interact effectively with people from cultures or belief systems different from one's own.
definition: The ability to understand, appreciate, and interact effectively with people from cultures or belief systems different from one's own.
example: Nurses who develop cultural competence can provide better, more respectful care to diverse patients.
exampleHindi: जो नर्सें सांस्कृतिक क्षमता विकसित करती हैं वे विविध रोगियों को बेहतर, अधिक सम्मानजनक देखभाल प्रदान कर सकती हैं।

meaning: The effort to understand and connect with the feelings, perspectives, and cultural experiences of someone from a different background.
definition: The effort to understand and connect with the feelings, perspectives, and cultural experiences of someone from a different background.
example: Reading literature from diverse authors is a wonderful way to develop cultural empathy.
exampleHindi: विविध लेखकों का साहित्य पढ़ना सांस्कृतिक सहानुभूति विकसित करने का एक शानदार तरीका है।

meaning: A lifelong process of self-reflection and learning, where a person remains open to learning about other cultures without judging them.
definition: A lifelong process of self-reflection and learning, where a person remains open to learning about other cultures without judging them.
example: Practicing cultural humility means listening to others and acknowledging that your own culture is not the only standard.
exampleHindi: सांस्कृतिक विनम्रता का अभ्यास करने का अर्थ है दूसरों की बात सुनना और यह स्वीकार करना कि आपकी अपनी संस्कृति ही एकमात्र मानक नहीं है।

meaning: The evaluation of other cultures according to preconceptions originating in the standards and customs of one's own culture.
definition: The evaluation of other cultures according to preconceptions originating in the standards and customs of one's own culture.
example: Believing that your country's food and customs are superior to all others is an example of ethnocentrism.
exampleHindi: यह विश्वास करना कि आपके देश का भोजन और रीति-रिवाज अन्य सभी से श्रेष्ठ हैं, जातीयतावाद का एक उदाहरण है।

meaning: A conversation where everyone's voice is welcomed and participants work together to understand each other's perspectives.
definition: A conversation where everyone's voice is welcomed and participants work together to understand each other's perspectives.
example: The town hall meeting fostered an inclusive dialogue between city planners and local residents.
exampleHindi: टाउन हॉल बैठक ने शहर के योजनाकारों और स्थानीय निवासियों के बीच एक समावेशी संवाद को बढ़ावा दिया।

meaning: The quality of including and treating all kinds of people fairly and equally, ensuring no one is left out.
definition: The quality of including and treating all kinds of people fairly and equally, ensuring no one is left out.
example: The festival organizers prioritized inclusiveness by providing sign language interpreters for all performances.
exampleHindi: उत्सव के आयोजकों ने सभी प्रदर्शनों के लिए सांकेतिक भाषा दुभाषियों को उपलब्ध कराकर समावेशिता को प्राथमिकता दी।

meaning: The ability to recognize, respect, and value cultural differences in communication and behavior.
definition: The ability to recognize, respect, and value cultural differences in communication and behavior.
example: Living abroad for a year helped her develop a deep intercultural sensitivity and respect for differences.
exampleHindi: एक वर्ष तक विदेश में रहने से उनमें गहरी अंतरसांस्कृतिक संवेदनशीलता और मतभेदों के प्रति सम्मान विकसित करने में मदद मिली।

meaning: The agreement between two or more people to value and honor each other's opinions, backgrounds, and human dignity.
definition: The agreement between two or more people to value and honor each other's opinions, backgrounds, and human dignity.
example: A successful marriage is built on a foundation of trust, communication, and mutual respect.
exampleHindi: एक सफल विवाह विश्वास, संचार और आपसी सम्मान की नींव पर बनता है।

meaning: The conscious knowledge of one's own character, feelings, motives, desires, and personal biases.
definition: Conscious knowledge of one's own character, feelings, motives, and desires.
example: Developing self-awareness helps leaders understand how their emotions and actions affect their team.
exampleHindi: आत्म-जागरूकता विकसित करने से नेताओं को यह समझने में मदद मिलती है कि उनकी भावनाएँ और कार्य उनकी टीम को कैसे प्रभावित करते हैं।

meaning: The careful thought and analysis of one's own beliefs, behaviors, and biases to learn and grow as a person.
definition: The process of examining one's own thoughts, feelings, and motivations seriously.
example: Regular self-reflection helped him realize that his past comments had been insensitive to others.
exampleHindi: नियमित आत्म-चिंतन से उन्हें यह एहसास हुआ कि उनकी पिछली टिप्पणियाँ दूसरों के प्रति असंवेदनशील थीं।

meaning: The human need to be accepted as a member of a social group and to feel connected to others in a community.
definition: The human need to be accepted as a member of a social group and to feel connected to others in a community.
example: Creating student clubs helps freshman feel a sense of social belonging during their first semester.
exampleHindi: छात्र क्लब बनाने से नए छात्रों को अपने पहले सेमेस्टर के दौरान सामाजिक जुड़ाव की भावना महसूस करने में मदद मिलती है।

meaning: The practice of holding a simplified, generalized, and often incorrect belief about a whole group of people.
definition: The practice of holding a simplified, generalized, and often incorrect belief about a whole group of people.
example: Assuming all older workers are bad with technology is an unfair form of stereotyping.
exampleHindi: यह मान लेना कि सभी पुराने कर्मचारी प्रौद्योगिकी के मामले में बुरे हैं, रूढ़िवादिता का एक अनुचित रूप है।
